message:
test(bd-m32k): console, formatter, trace coverage improvements

Add 33 new tests across three files:
- console.rs: strip_markup edge cases (trailing backslash, unclosed tag,
  backslash escapes), with_writer plain mode, Default impl
- formatter.rs: truncation boundaries (exact max, no max, tiny widths),
  should_use_rich, style_for_level, FormattedLog/LogLevel/LogEvent traits,
  format_event with all options, rich target truncation
- trace.rs: epoch_to_datetime boundaries (epoch, leap year Feb 29, year
  end, mid-year), TraceEntry/TraceSummary/MethodTiming serde roundtrips,
  span context propagation for requests/metrics, sanitize_filename

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
